description: Formal evaluation suite for the industrial deep diagnostic skill. Tests 5 industrial scenarios covering CNC machining, film production, chemical reactor, heat exchanger, and steel rolling. Each test verifies correct root cause identification, transition event analysis, confounder rejection, and statistical validation integrity.

evals.name: CNC_spindle_bearing_spalling
evals.prompt: 一名工艺工程师从精密加工中心提供了一份数据集。该数据集包含1050行，列包括 spindle_vibration_mm_s、spindle_temp_C、surface_roughness_Ra_um、tool_age_parts、tool_id、material（AL7075/AL6061/SS304）和 timestamp。在过去8小时内，他们注意到表面粗糙度 Ra 从 ~0.5μm 上升至 ~3.5μm，废品率上升。请分析数据并找出根因。数据文件位于 data/eval_cnc_spindle_wear/data.csv
evals.expected_output: 1) 根因: 主轴轴承内圈剥落（非刀具磨损）；2) 换刀后粗糙度不重置的过渡事件分析；3) 按material分层的UNIVERSAL验证；4) DETERMINED诊断类型；5) 置信度>85

assertions.name: correct_root_cause
assertions.description: 诊断正确识别根因为主轴轴承退化（非刀具磨损）
assertions.check: diagnosis.primary_finding contains 轴承 or 主轴

assertions.name: transition_event_analysis
assertions.description: 诊断包含换刀事件的过渡分析
assertions.check: evidence.json or diagnosis.json contains transition or 换刀

assertions.name: rejects_tool_wear
assertions.description: 排除刀具磨损为唯一根因
assertions.check: hypotheses.eliminated contains tool_id or 刀具

assertions.name: product_stratified
assertions.description: 按material做过分层验证
assertions.check: diagnosis.product_stratified_analysis present and UNIVERSAL

assertions.name: diagnosis_type_correct
assertions.description: 诊断类型为DETERMINED
assertions.check: diagnosis.diagnosis_type == DETERMINED

assertions.name: confidence_above_80
assertions.description: 整体置信度>=80
assertions.check: confidence.overall_confidence.score >= 80

evals.name: BOPET_film_MD_TH003_drift
evals.prompt: BOPET薄膜生产线出现产品质量问题——厚度波动增大、熔斑率上升。数据集包含2500行x39列，涵盖12个MD温区、6个TD温区、5个模口间隙位置。已知MD_TH003设定值为95°C。请分析根因。数据文件位于 data/eval_bopet_film_drift/data.csv
evals.expected_output: 1) MD_TH003加热器退化为主因（温度从95°C漂移至~86°C）；2) 模口右侧间隙增大为次因；3) 筛网更换(t=1200)后质量不重置；4) 按product_grade分层验证；5) DETERMINED诊断

assertions.name: identifies_MD_TH003
assertions.description: 识别MD_TH003为唯一漂移温区
assertions.check: diagnosis.hypotheses.surviving[0].name contains MD_TH003 or 温区3

assertions.name: screen_change_transition
assertions.description: 分析筛网更换事件中质量不重置
assertions.check: anomaly_report.json has transition_events with screen or 筛网

assertions.name: double_root_cause
assertions.description: 识别双根因（加热器+模口间隙）
assertions.check: hypotheses.surviving length >= 2 OR mentions both 加热 and 间隙

assertions.name: grade_stratified
assertions.description: 按product_grade做过UNIVERSAL验证
assertions.check: diagnosis.product_stratified_analysis present

assertions.name: confidence_above_80
assertions.description: 整体置信度>=80
assertions.check: confidence.overall_confidence.score >= 80

evals.name: CSTR_catalyst_poisoning
evals.prompt: 连续搅拌反应器(CSTR)出现转化率从~95%降至~68%的问题。数据共1440行x16列，包括反应温度、压力、H₂分压、进料速率、转化率、副产物浓度等。催化剂再生在t=1200进行了。请分析根因。数据文件位于 data/eval_reactor_catalyst/data.csv
evals.expected_output: 1) 催化剂硫中毒为主因；2) 再生(t=1200)后活性部分恢复的确诊证据；3) H₂压缩机维护和进料泵跳车辨识为干扰事件；4) DETERMINED诊断

assertions.name: identifies_catalyst_poisoning
assertions.description: 诊断正确指出催化剂毒化为根因
assertions.check: diagnosis.primary_finding contains 催化剂 or 毒化 or poison

assertions.name: regeneration_analysis
assertions.description: 分析催化剂再生事件
assertions.check: evidence.json or diagnosis.json mentions 再生 or regeneration

assertions.name: rejects_feed_pump
assertions.description: 排除进料泵跳车事件为根因
assertions.check: hypotheses.eliminated contains 泵 or pump

assertions.name: product_stratified
assertions.description: 按catalyst_bed_id做到分层分析
assertions.check: diagnosis.product_stratified_analysis present

assertions.name: confidence_above_80
assertions.description: 整体置信度>=80
assertions.check: confidence.overall_confidence.score >= 80

evals.name: HX_CaCO3_scaling
evals.prompt: 管壳式换热器效率从~90%降至~68%，出口热流体温度升高。数据2160行x16列，涵盖进出口温度、HTC、压降、泵速等。酸洗在t=1300进行。请分析根因。数据文件位于 data/eval_heat_exchanger_scaling/data.csv
evals.expected_output: 1) CaCO₃结垢为主因；2) 酸洗(t=1300)HTC部分恢复的确诊证据；3) 压降不恢复→垢层未完全去除；4) 泵维护和冷却塔风扇故障辨识为干扰事件；5) DETERMINED

assertions.name: identifies_scaling
assertions.description: 诊断明确指出CaCO₃结垢为根因
assertions.check: diagnosis.primary_finding contains 结垢 or scaling or 垢

assertions.name: acid_wash_transition
assertions.description: 分析酸洗事件中HTC部分恢复
assertions.check: evidence.json or diagnosis.json mentions 酸洗 or cleaning

assertions.name: pressure_drop_noted
assertions.description: 识别压降不随酸洗恢复的特征
assertions.check: diagnosis mentions 压降 or pressure_drop

assertions.name: rejects_pump_issue
assertions.description: 排除泵维护事件为根因
assertions.check: hypotheses.eliminated contains 泵 or pump

assertions.name: confidence_above_80
assertions.description: 整体置信度>=80
assertions.check: confidence.overall_confidence.score >= 80

evals.name: cold_rolling_roll_eccentricity
evals.prompt: 冷轧机出现出口厚度波动增大（±40μm）和振纹缺陷。数据2500行x18列，50个钢卷。Coil#35进行了换辊。请分析根因。数据文件位于 data/eval_steel_cold_rolling/data.csv
evals.expected_output: 1) 工作辊轴承偏心为主因；2) 换辊(coil#35)后厚度偏差完全重置的确诊证据；3) Chatter振纹特征频率（~2Hz=轧辊旋转频率）；4) 热轧原料厚度异常(coil#28)辨识为上游问题；5) DETERMINED

assertions.name: identifies_roll_eccentricity
assertions.description: 诊断正确指出轧辊偏心/轴承为根因
assertions.check: diagnosis.primary_finding contains 轧辊 or 偏心 or 轴承

assertions.name: roll_change_transition
assertions.description: 分析换辊事件中厚度偏差完全重置
assertions.check: diagnosis or evidence mentions 换辊 or roll_change

assertions.name: coil_28_identified
assertions.description: 识别coil#28原料厚度异常为干扰事件
assertions.check: hypotheses.eliminated contains 原料 or 热轧 or entry_thickness

assertions.name: chatter_frequency_note
assertions.description: 提及振纹特征(2Hz/周期性)与轧辊的关系
assertions.check: diagnosis or evidence mentions 2Hz or 周期 or chatter

assertions.name: confidence_above_80
assertions.description: 整体置信度>=80
assertions.check: confidence.overall_confidence.score >= 80
